overallSummary: Full-stack engineer with expertise in AI-powered platform development, having delivered 200+ production-ready projects spanning ML, microservices, and scalable web applications. Proven track record of architecting comprehensive automation platforms processing millions of lines of code, with deep expertise in TypeScript, Python, React, and cloud infrastructure. Specialized in building GPU-accelerated ML workflows, real-time collaborative systems, and end-to-end development platforms that integrate computer vision, workflow automation, and distributed processing capabilities.
recommendedBullets: Architected 8 production-ready AI-powered platforms with microservices architecture, processing over 12M+ lines of code across TypeScript, Python, and JavaScript tech stacks
Built scalable ML infrastructure supporting GPU-accelerated PyTorch model training, YOLO computer vision workflows, and distributed processing systems handling 5,000+ automated tasks
Developed comprehensive full-stack applications using React, Node.js, and Firebase, including real-time collaborative platforms supporting multi-user sessions and cloud integration
Engineered robust automation platforms orchestrating AI APIs, browser automation, and workflow management systems across backend services and frontend dashboards
Delivered 200+ open-source projects spanning ML libraries, full-stack web applications, mobile apps, and development tools with focus on TypeScript and Python ecosystems
Implemented production-grade testing and deployment pipelines using Jest, Mocha, Webpack, and Vite across diverse project portfolios including 3D WebGL applications and enterprise platforms
Built end-to-end development platforms featuring interactive CLIs with 14+ automation tools, real-time pipeline management, and AI-powered content generation workflows

topProjects.projectTitle: ML-Powered UI Element Recognition System for Browser Automation
topProjects.oneLiner: Developed a production-ready computer vision library using PyTorch and Siamese neural networks to enable robust UI element matching in web automation workflows, processing 5,000+ lines of Python code with distributed training capabilities.
bulletPoints: Architected and implemented a Siamese neural network with MobileNetV3-Small backbone achieving <2ms inference time and 2.5M parameters for real-time UI element recognition
Built distributed training infrastructure with remote GPU utilization and live progress streaming, supporting PK batch sampling (32 identities × 4 samples) with NT-Xent contrastive loss
Developed comprehensive data pipeline from capture to production deployment including ONNX export with quantization for optimized CPU inference
Engineered 12 specialized UI augmentations (theme inversion, state transitions, compression simulation) and multi-crop inference strategies for robust element matching
Implemented production-ready inference system with embedding caching, comprehensive evaluation metrics (ROC-AUC, EER, TAR@FMR), and support for multiple data formats
highlights: Custom distributed training system with remote GPU coordination

topProjects.projectTitle: AI-Powered Development Platform with Multi-Application Architecture
topProjects.oneLiner: Built a comprehensive TypeScript-based development platform featuring an interactive CLI with 14 built-in automation tools, real-time pipeline management dashboard, and AI-powered social media scheduling system.
bulletPoints: Architected a 115K+ line monorepo platform with 3 interconnected applications using TypeScript, Next.js, and Preact, implementing WebSocket-based real-time communication and Firebase persistence

Developed an extensible CLI tool with embedded agentic-loop engine supporting 14 built-in automation tools including file operations, shell execution, Git management, web scraping, and database queries
Integrated multiple AI providers (Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPT, Groq Llama) with multi-turn conversation memory and project context loading for intelligent automation workflows
Built real-time pipeline management dashboard with WebSocket relay connections enabling remote workflow execution monitoring and control across distributed development environments
Implemented automated social media scheduling system with browser automation via Puppeteer, supporting multi-platform posting through configurable JSON connector architecture
highlights: Custom extension system with activate(ctx) pattern for scalable tool development
Real-time multi-application communication via WebSocket relay architecture

topProjects.oneLiner: Built a scalable microservices platform orchestrating multiple AI APIs to automate end-to-end multimedia content creation with distributed GPU processing and real-time workflow management
bulletPoints: Architected distributed microservices system using Google Cloud Run, Firebase, and containerized GPU workers to process 2.7M+ lines of TypeScript/Python code across 899 files
Implemented intelligent GPU resource allocation with automatic fallback (H100→A100→L4→T4→CPU) and horizontal scaling for AI model inference workloads
Developed visual workflow builder using React Flow enabling non-technical users to create complex AI content pipelines combining text, image, audio, and video generation
Orchestrated multi-modal content automation integrating OpenAI, Midjourney, ElevenLabs, and Suno AI APIs with Firebase job queuing and Google Cloud Tasks
Built real-time audio processing system with beat detection, FFmpeg integration, and automated YouTube upload pipeline for seamless content distribution
Designed containerized worker architecture with Docker for GPU-accelerated image generation and Blender integration for 3D visualization workflows
highlights: Complex distributed architecture with intelligent GPU resource management
Integration of 5+ AI services into cohesive automated workflows

topProjects.projectTitle: AI-Powered Computer Vision Workflow Management Platform
topProjects.oneLiner: Architected a scalable microservices platform orchestrating GPU-accelerated YOLO model training, multi-modal AI processing, and automated email workflows across 160k+ lines of code
bulletPoints: Built microservices architecture with Express.js coordinating GPU-accelerated YOLO training pipeline using PyTorch, CUDA, and A100/H100 support for computer vision workloads
Implemented automated cloud deployment system managing worker pools across Google Cloud Platform with Docker containerization for both CPU and GPU-intensive ML tasks
Developed intelligent email processing system with Gmail API integration, automated filtering, and AI-powered response generation using OpenAI GPT and Groq models
Engineered real-time image processing pipeline integrating Canvas, Sharp, FFmpeg, and Tesseract OCR with Firebase data synchronization and backup automation
Created browser automation framework using Puppeteer and RobotJS for web scraping, image capture, and dynamic content processing at scale
highlights: GPU-accelerated ML pipeline with A100/H100 support

topProjects.projectTitle: Visual Workflow Automation Platform for Content Creation
topProjects.oneLiner: Architected a comprehensive workflow automation platform orchestrating AI content generation, social media posting, and browser automation across 5M+ lines of code
bulletPoints: Engineered a modular workflow engine with JSON-based node definitions supporting complex branching, loops, and nested workflow composition across 243 files
Integrated multiple APIs including GPT models, Midjourney, Chrome DevTools Protocol, and social media platforms (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube) for end-to-end automation
Implemented browser automation system with REST API endpoints for Chrome control, file system operations, and global state management
Developed visual workflow designer with node-based graph execution supporting AI content generation, 3D rendering automation, and email processing workflows
highlights: 5M+ lines of code with comprehensive workflow automation
Complex multi-service integration including AI, social media, and 3D rendering platforms

topProjects.oneLiner: Built a comprehensive automation platform orchestrating AI services, browser automation, and email processing with 45K+ lines of TypeScript code and GPU-accelerated ML workflows
bulletPoints: Architected modular Express.js platform with 176+ files integrating OpenAI/Groq APIs, Gmail/Microsoft Graph APIs, and browser automation using robotjs for human-like interactions
Implemented dynamic workflow execution engine processing JSON configurations with materialized file structures and real-time WebSocket progress monitoring
Developed multi-modal media processing pipeline handling audio generation (ElevenLabs), image processing (Sharp/Canvas), PDF text extraction, and GPU-accelerated YOLO model training
Built production-ready resilience with global error handlers, health checks, Docker containerization, and parallel processing using worker threads for data augmentation
Created Chrome extension integration for DOM manipulation and tab management with OAuth2 authentication and comprehensive email automation including bulk operations
highlights: 45K+ lines of production-grade TypeScript with comprehensive AI service integration
GPU-accelerated ML workflows with parallel processing and real-time monitoring

topProjects.projectTitle: Real-Time Collaborative Art Platform with AI Integration
topProjects.oneLiner: Built a scalable real-time collaborative drawing platform supporting multi-user sessions, AI-powered art generation, and therapeutic interaction modes using Firebase microservices architecture
bulletPoints: Architected full-stack application with React/TypeScript frontend and Firebase Cloud Functions backend serving real-time collaborative drawing for multiple concurrent users
Implemented real-time presence system using Firebase Realtime Database to track user status, drawing locations, and audio/video states across distributed sessions
Developed AI integration layer supporting Google Imagen and OpenAI models for context-aware art generation with emotional state processing and voice prompt capabilities
Built scalable data architecture using Firestore with append-only operations history, monotonic versioning, and server-mediated access control through Cloud Functions
Created modular component system managing individual user drawing layers, HTML5 Canvas rendering, and client-side layer compositing for optimal performance
highlights: Complex real-time multiplayer architecture with presence tracking
AI integration with multiple providers and emotional context awareness

topProjects.projectTitle: 3D Tower Defense Game with Internationalization & WebGL
topProjects.oneLiner: Architected a full-stack 3D tower defense game using React Three Fiber and TypeScript with Firebase cloud integration, internationalization support, and complex state management across 7.6M+ lines of code.
bulletPoints: Developed a sophisticated 3D web game using React Three Fiber, Three.js, and WebGL with orbital camera controls and real-time rendering of complex game objects and particle effects
Implemented comprehensive internationalization system supporting English and French with localized audio, subtitles, and character voice acting across multiple game components
Built scalable component-based architecture with Zustand state management, modular game systems, and clear separation between 3D rendering logic and 2D UI overlays
Integrated Firebase for cloud deployment and data persistence, managing complex game state including progression systems, resource economy, and character management
Engineered advanced gameplay mechanics including dual damage systems, progressive tech tiers, and dynamic tower/enemy interactions with real-time collision detection
highlights: 7.6M+ lines of sophisticated game logic and 3D rendering code
Full internationalization with multimedia asset localization
